munit:test.name: mf-impl-get-accounts-no-queryparams-success
munit:test.description: Verify mf-impl-get-accounts retrieves all accounts when no query params are provided
munit:test.doc:name: Get Accounts No Query Params Success Test
munit:test.doc:description: Mocks sf-get-accounts and asserts the DWL pass-through response is correctly returned

munit:set-event.doc:name: Set Initial Empty Payload
munit:set-event.doc:description: Provides an empty array payload to simulate a GET request with no body

munit-tools:mock-when.doc:name: Mock sf-get-accounts Sub-Flow
munit-tools:mock-when.doc:description: Returns a fixed list of two accounts without making actual HTTP calls

munit-tools:then-return.doc:name: Return Two Mock Accounts
munit-tools:then-return.doc:description: Supplies a two-element account list as the mock response

flow-ref.name: mf-impl-get-accounts
flow-ref.doc:name: Invoke mf-impl-get-accounts
flow-ref.doc:description: Calls the implementation flow under test

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert Payload Not Null
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Checks the returned payload is not null

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert Payload Has Records
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Ensures at least one account was returned

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert First Account Name
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Validates the first account name is Acme Corp

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert Second Account Name
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Validates the second account name is Globex Inc

munit:test.name: mf-impl-get-accounts-success-with-query-params
munit:test.description: Verify mf-impl-get-accounts returns filtered accounts when accountName, fromDate and toDate query params are provided
munit:test.doc:name: Get Accounts With Query Params
munit:test.doc:description: Mocks sf-get-accounts and asserts that the filtered account list is returned

munit:set-event.doc:name: Set Test Event With Query Params
munit:set-event.doc:description: Simulates a GET request with accountName, fromDate and toDate query parameters

munit-tools:mock-when.doc:name: Mock sf-get-accounts With Query Params
munit-tools:mock-when.doc:description: Returns a filtered two-account list matching the accountName Acme

munit-tools:then-return.doc:name: Return Filtered Acme Accounts
munit-tools:then-return.doc:description: Supplies two Acme accounts as the mock response

flow-ref.name: mf-impl-get-accounts
flow-ref.doc:name: Call mf-impl-get-accounts Flow
flow-ref.doc:description: Executes the implementation flow that retrieves filtered accounts

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert Payload Not Null
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Verifies the payload is not null after flow execution

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert Payload Not Empty
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Ensures at least one filtered account was returned

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert First Filtered Account Name
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Checks first account name equals Acme Corp

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert Second Filtered Account Name
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Checks second account name equals Acme Holdings

munit:test.name: mf-impl-post-account-successful-creation
munit:test.description: Verify that mf-impl-post-account creates an account and correctly maps status, id, message, transactionId and timeStamp from the DWL
munit:test.doc:name: Post Account Successful Creation Test
munit:test.doc:description: Mocks sf-post-accounts and asserts the p-post-account-response DWL maps all required fields

munit:set-event.doc:name: Set Account Creation Request Payload
munit:set-event.doc:description: Provides a minimal account request body with name and billing city

munit-tools:mock-when.doc:name: Mock sf-post-accounts Sub-Flow
munit-tools:mock-when.doc:description: Returns a successful account creation response from the downstream PAPI

munit-tools:then-return.doc:name: Return Mocked Creation Response
munit-tools:then-return.doc:description: Supplies a successful creation payload with status, id, message, transactionId and timeStamp

munit-tools:payload.value: #[{ status: "SUCCESS", id: "001xx000003DHP0AAO", message: "Account created", transactionId: "txn-12345", timeStamp: "2026-06-26T10:15:30Z" }]

flow-ref.name: mf-impl-post-account
flow-ref.doc:name: Invoke mf-impl-post-account Flow
flow-ref.doc:description: Calls the post-account implementation flow under test

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert Payload Not Null
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Asserts the returned payload is not null

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert Status Equals SUCCESS
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Verifies the mapped status field equals SUCCESS

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert Account Id Matches
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Checks the returned account id matches the expected Salesforce Id

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert Message Matches
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Validates the response message equals Account created

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert Transaction Id Matches
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Ensures the transactionId is correctly mapped in the response

munit:test.name: mf-impl-patch-account-success-test
munit:test.description: Verify that mf-impl-patch-account updates an account and returns the confirmation payload from sf-patch-account
munit:test.doc:name: Patch Account Success Test
munit:test.doc:description: Mocks sf-patch-account and asserts the status and account id are returned correctly

munit:set-event.doc:name: Set Patch Event Payload
munit:set-event.doc:description: Sets the request payload with the accountId and updated name

munit-tools:mock-when.doc:name: Mock sf-patch-account Sub-Flow
munit-tools:mock-when.doc:description: Returns a successful update confirmation from the mocked downstream PAPI

munit-tools:then-return.doc:name: Return Mocked Patch Response
munit-tools:then-return.doc:description: Supplies a SUCCESS status with the patched account id

flow-ref.name: mf-impl-patch-account
flow-ref.doc:name: Invoke mf-impl-patch-account Flow
flow-ref.doc:description: Calls the patch-account implementation flow under test

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert Payload Not Null
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Asserts that the returned payload is not null

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert Status Is SUCCESS
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Asserts the response status field equals SUCCESS

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert Account Id Matches
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Asserts the returned account id matches the expected value

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert Update Message Matches
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Validates the update confirmation message is correct
